title: Smoky Eastern Lamb Pasta
description: A flavorful and aromatic pasta dish that combines the spices of the Middle East with the smokiness of lamb.
instructions: Season the lamb shoulder with salt, black pepper, cumin, and coriander.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe pan over medium-high heat.
Sear the lamb shoulder until browned on all sides, then transfer to the oven.
Roast the lamb in the oven for 20 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the lamb is cooking, cook the pasta according to the package instructions.
In a large pan, heat a couple of tablespoons of olive oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for another minute, until fragrant.
Add the diced tomato and cook for 2-3 minutes, until the tomato starts to break down.
Add the cooked pasta to the pan, tossing to combine with the tomato mixture.
Shred the cooked lamb and add it to the pasta, tossing to combine.
Season with smoked paprika and serve hot.
